title: Source-resolved toxicogenomics reveals compartment-conditioned BDE-47 responses in human placental evidence
description: Communications Biology pre-submission reproducibility package for a source-resolved toxicogenomic reconstruction of BDE-47 placental evidence. The package contains the combined LaTeX manuscript and Supplementary Information, cover letter, derived tables, claim-boundary audits, figure source data, publication-quality figure exports and build scripts. Large raw mass-spectrometry files are not mirrored; public raw data remain available from the original repositories cited in the manuscript.
